elements.name: ASN Creation with Lot Items  using EDI file and validate ASN in Manhattan

steps.name: User Open the chrome browser using selenium
user update EDI file "ATM SingleLine PO - LotItems" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
